stimulus: While one is cold-blooded and one is ______ and mammals are both vertebrates—that is, they are animals with backbones and internal skeletons.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice A is correct. A comma correctly separates the introductory dependent clause ("While...not") from the independent clause that follows.

Choice B creates a sentence fragment — "While...not" can't stand alone. Choice C creates a run-on with no punctuation. Choice D misuses a semicolon between a dependent clause and an independent clause.
